Direct & indirect tax

Tax & Regulatory services in Mumbai

We handle the full direct and indirect tax lifecycle — advisory, planning, and routine compliance — alongside company law and outsourcing support.

What this practice covers

  • Direct Tax Advisory
  • Indirect Tax Advisory (GST)
  • Tax Planning
  • Tax Compliance (GST & TDS)
  • Company Law Services
  • Accounting & Outsourcing
